new_fixes_this_run.description: gate_20 probe: 0.85x size for 70-80% conf signals. 100d backtest shows 45.2% WR at this tier.
gate_20 probe: track SHORT vs LONG WR with short_direction_veto suspended. SHORT=46.4% WR > LONG=39.5% WR in 100d.
gate_20 probe: cap HYPE position size at 0.75x. HYPE=68% of total losses.

skipped_this_run.reason: BELOW_THRESHOLD: confidence=71% < 75%. Escalated to AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL after 8 consecutive runs.
PARAMETER_AMBIGUITY: HYPE SymbolProfile atr_mult_sl=2.0 contradicts graduated_rules 'from 1.0'. Deferred.

run127_note: Run 127: 3 new gate_20 probe rules added (CONF_70_80_DEGRADATION_PROBE, SHORT_DIRECTION_VETO_INVERSION, HYPE_SIZING_CAP_PROBE). HYPE_SHORT_VETO_SPLIT still AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL (9 consecutive runs, 71% conf).
